pattern: cmd; var=$? under set -e: assignment never runs — use cmd || var=$?
grep 'started' matches both RUNNING and STOPPED states — use 'already started'
sha256sum with path prefix fails verification — cd into dir first: (cd $DIST_DIR && sha256sum ${FILE##*/})
shfmt -sr requires '2> /dev/null' not '2>/dev/null' in certain contexts
RC version compare: split on . then strip %%-* makes 1.0.0-rc.5 == 1.0.0-rc.2 — separate release from pre-release first
Subagent silently reverted verified fix — always git diff worktree before accepting changes
